title: Garlicky Chicken Enchilada Casserole
description: A creamy and flavorful casserole combining chicken, enchilada sauce, and a garlicky twist. Perfect for a weeknight dinner.

ingredients.name: mexican cheese
ingredients.notes: shredded queso fresco or Monterey Jack

instructions: Cook the chicken in a skillet over medium-high heat until browned and cooked through.
In a separate skillet, sauté the garlic until fragrant.
Stir in the enchilada sauce and bring to a simmer.
In a large mixing bowl, combine the cooked chicken, enchilada sauce mixture, and shredded cheese.
Pour the heavy cream into the bowl and stir until well combined.
Transfer the mixture to a 9x13 inch baking dish.
Sprinkle the shredded queso fresco on top of the casserole.
Bake for 25-30 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
Remove from the oven and let cool for 5-10 minutes before serving.
